title: ranunculus acris var. atlanticus
intro: Ranunculus acris var. atlanticus, also known as the Atlantic Buttercup, is a subspecies of the Ranunculus acris plant, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of the Atlantic Buttercup include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ranunculus acris var. atlanticus can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and overall well-being.
